evidence: packages/btd/src/wallet.ts defines network-scoped signer sessions, capabilities, serverCustody: false, and address authorization proof
proofless sessions remain state: prepared with failureReason: address_authorization_required
packages/btd/__tests__/v27-crypto-primitives.test.ts proves proofless sessions fail closed before PSBT signing

closureCriteria.criterion: transaction construction and signing handoff do not require server custody of user private keys
evidence: packages/btd/src/bitcoin-fees.ts builds BTC fee receipts only through authorized wallet sessions and stamps serverCustody: false
packages/btd/src/bitcoin-provider.ts takes signed PSBT handoff input instead of private keys
protocol-demonstration/src/v27-crypto-primitives.js requires wallet authorization proof and emits serverCustody: false

closureCriteria.criterion: PSBT-style unsigned/signed/broadcast/confirmed flow or accepted wallet-native equivalent is implemented
evidence: packages/btd/src/bitcoin-fees.ts permits prepared -> signed -> broadcast -> confirmed, replaced, reorged, or failed transitions and rejects invalid transitions
packages/btd/src/bitcoin-provider.ts wraps provider prepare, broadcast, and observe lifecycle calls behind a network-checked boundary
packages/api/src/routes/btd-crypto.ts exposes prepare, mark_signed, mark_broadcast, and observe actions on /btd/btc-fee-transaction

closureCriteria.criterion: BTC fee transaction receipt binds txid, network, sats paid, Exchange sequence, and Terminal journal root
evidence: BtcFeeTransactionReceipt includes walletAuthorizationProof, network, txid, psbt, satsPaid, exchangeSequence, terminalJournalRoot, feeAsset: BTC, and serverCustody: false
buildBtdBtcFeeTransactionSettlement wraps each receipt in a btc_fee_payment Terminal journal entry

supabase/migrations/002_v27_btd_crypto_registry.sql persists btc_fee_transactions with wallet_authorization_proof, txid, PSBT, sats, Exchange sequence, Terminal journal root, finality, BTC-only, and no-custody constraints

closureCriteria.criterion: regtest or equivalent local-chain tests cover broadcast, confirmation, replacement/failure, and replay
evidence: packages/btd/__tests__/v27-crypto-primitives.test.ts covers signed, broadcast, confirmed, invalid-transition failure, and BTC-only receipt validation
packages/api/src/routes/__tests__/btd-crypto.test.ts covers route-level prepare, signed, broadcast, and observed confirmation settlements
protocol-demonstration/test/v27-crypto-primitives.test.js covers prepared and confirmed BTC fee receipt behavior

closureCriteria.criterion: signet proof covers public-network transaction observation
evidence: packages/btd/__tests__/v27-crypto-primitives.test.ts uses a signet-scoped BitcoinFeeTransactionProvider harness for prepare, broadcast, and observe
packages/btd/src/bitcoin-provider.ts rejects provider/session network mismatch
protocol-demonstration/test/v27-crypto-primitives.test.js accepts signet as the demonstration public Bitcoin proof network

closureCriteria.criterion: $BTD remains rejected as a fee asset
evidence: packages/btd/src/bitcoin-fees.ts assertBtcFeeTransactionReceipt rejects any feeAsset other than BTC
packages/btd/__tests__/v27-crypto-primitives.test.ts mutates a BTC fee receipt to BTD and proves rejection
supabase/migrations/002_v27_btd_crypto_registry.sql requires btc_fee_transactions.fee_asset = 'BTC'

closureCriteria.criterion: commercial API route is unversioned and commit-gated
evidence: packages/api/src/routes/btd-crypto.ts exposes /btd/btc-fee-transaction without introducing a versioned route prefix
uapi/app/api/btd/btc-fee-transaction/route.ts binds the Next.js App Router endpoint
registry writes occur only when commitToRegistry is explicitly true

validatedCommands.notes: Jest reports pre-existing duplicate manual mock warnings outside the V27 package/API slice.
Jest reports an existing ts-jest globals deprecation warning.

nonPromotionAssertions: BITCODE_SPEC.txt remained V26 until Gate 16 promotion
BITCODE_SPEC_V27_PROVEN.md did not exist until Gate 16 promotion
Gate 10 closure does not claim production wallet adapter UX, value-bearing broadcaster credentials, mainnet launch, generated V27 proof-family closure, or V27 promotion
All BTD API route paths remain unversioned
